name: Corncob Design Language
description: Lightweight, accessible vanilla JS design system. Perfect for AI-assisted website and application development.

button.name: Button
button.description: Primary action and interactive button component
button.accessibility: Fully keyboard accessible, proper ARIA roles

input.name: Input
input.description: Text input field with label and error state support

select.name: Select
select.description: Custom dropdown with keyboard navigation (planned, not yet implemented in JS/CSS)

checkbox.name: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Checkbox input for single or grouped selections

radio.name: Radio
radio.description: Radio button for single selection in a group

card.name: Card
card.description: Content container with optional header, body, and footer

modal.name: Modal
modal.description: Accessible dialog/modal with focus trap and ESC support
modal.accessibility: Includes focus management and ARIA dialog role

table.name: Table
table.description: Data table with striped rows and hover states

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: User avatar with image or initials fallback

tooltip.name: Tooltip
tooltip.description: Web Component tooltip that shows on hover/focus. Must be placed inside a .corn-tooltip--anchor parent.
tooltip.accessibility: Automatically adds role=tooltip and aria-labelledby to the anchor
tooltip.example: <button class="corn-button corn-tooltip--anchor">Hover me<corn-tooltip class="corn-tooltip" position="top">Tooltip text</corn-tooltip></button>

popover.name: Popover
popover.description: Web Component popover panel toggled by a .corn-pop trigger. Must be placed inside a .corn-popover--anchor parent.
popover.accessibility: Trigger uses aria-controls pointing to the popover id; closes on outside click and ESC
popover.example: • Item 1

expandable.name: Expandable
expandable.description: Web Component animated expand/collapse panel wrapping a native <details> element. Use the name attribute on <details> children for accordion behavior.
expandable.accessibility: Built on native <details>/<summary> for keyboard and screen-reader support

button-bar.name: Button Bar
button-bar.description: Web Component toolbar that automatically moves overflowing buttons into an overflow popover menu.
button-bar.accessibility: Overflow button uses aria-controls; all actions remain keyboard accessible

recommendedSystemPrompt: You are an expert frontend developer using the Corncob Design Language. Use only `corn-*` class names and vanilla HTML/JS. Never use Tailwind, Bootstrap, or any other CSS framework. Prioritize accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), semantic HTML, and clean code. Use the official component variants and sizes exactly as documented in components.json.
aiUsageTips: Use semantic HTML elements where possible (button, nav, main, etc.)
For modals, ensure proper focus trap and ARIA attributes
Prefer data attributes for JS initialization when needed
